one_time_description: Loss on disposal of tangible capital assets (land write-down of $2,025,363)
economic_notes: Band operates marina, marine fuel dock, timber harvesting, fisheries licenses/quota, environmental assessments, shopping centres, real estate, boat repair yard, rock hauling, carbon credits, grizzly bear tours through multiple GBEs and partnerships. Controlled entities include Discovery Harbour Holdings Ltd. and Campbell River Indian Band Development Corporation.
notes: Prior period adjustment of $742,651 related to unrecorded interest in Nanwakolas Offset Limited Partnership. Large loss on disposal of land assets ($2,025,363) recorded in current year. Consolidated entities include 2 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 14 GBEs/partnerships accounted for by modified equity method. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($4,474,994) + CMHC ($113,133) + FNHA ($80,260) + Province of BC ($564,901) + School District 72 ($35,930) + Ottawa Trust Funds ($4,588) = $5,273,806. OSR includes taxation, GBE income, rent/land leases, sales, and other revenue. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided financial statements.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
